functions.name: extra
functions.signature: itasca.block.zonearray.extra(slot: int) -> array float{zone} or float{zone,3}
functions.description: Get the zone extra data in the given slot as an array. Extra variables accessed by array must be of type float or vec.

functions.name: fill_pos
functions.description: Fill an existing array with the zone centroid location. The array must be the correct shape.

functions.name: fluid_prop
functions.description: Return an array of the fluid property prop_name for each zone. If a property is not specified in a zone, fill_value is given for that zone. fill_value is an optional argument and defaults to zero.

functions.name: hostblock
functions.description: Return an array of the host block ID.

functions.name: ids
functions.description: Get the zone ids as an array.

functions.name: in_group
functions.description: Return block group membership as a Boolean array.

functions.name: mass
functions.description: Return an array of the zone mass.

functions.name: pos
functions.description: Get a numpy array of the zone centroid location.

functions.name: pp
functions.description: Return an array of the zone pore pressures.

functions.name: prop_scalar
functions.description: Return an array of the property prop_name for each zone. Only properties of type double are supported by this function. If a property is not specified in a zone, fill_value is given for that zone. fill_value is an optional argument and defaults to zero.

functions.name: set_extra
functions.signature: itasca.block.zonearray.set_extra(slot: int, data: array float{zone} or float{zone, 3}) -> None
functions.description: Set the zone extra data in the given slot with an array. Extra variables set by array must be of type float or vec.

functions.name: set_fluid_prop
functions.description: Set the fluid property prop_name of each zone. The input array should be shape (nzone,).

functions.name: set_group
functions.signature: itasca.block.zonearray.set_group(membership: array bool{nzone}, group_name: str, slot="default") -> None
functions.description: Set block group from an array. Where membership True set the corresponding block to be a member of group group_name in the given slot.

functions.name: set_prop_scalar
functions.description: Set the property prop_name of each zone. Only properties of type double or vec3 are supported. The input array should be shape (nzone,).

functions.name: set_stress
functions.description: Set the zone stresses.

functions.name: set_stress_flat
functions.description: Set the zone stresses.

functions.name: set_thermal_prop
functions.description: Set the thermal property prop_name of each zone. The input array should be shape (nzone,).

functions.name: state
functions.description: Return an array of the zone state.

functions.name: strain_inc
functions.description: Get an array of the zone strain increment.

functions.name: strain_inc_flat
functions.description: Get an array of the zone strain increment. The return value is a 2D array where the component ordering is xx,yy,zz,xy,yz,xz.

functions.name: strain_rate
functions.description: Get an array of the zone strain rate.

functions.name: strain_rate_flat
functions.description: Get an array of the zone strain rate. The return value is a 2D array where the component ordering is xx,yy,zz,xy,yz,xz.

functions.name: strain_rotation_inc
functions.description: Get an array of the zone rotational increment tensor.

functions.name: strain_rotation_inc_flat
functions.description: Get an array of the zone rotational increment tensor. The return value is a 2D array where the component ordering is xx,yy,zz,xy,yz,xz.

functions.name: strain_rotation_rate
functions.description: Get an array of the zone rotational rate tensor.

functions.name: strain_rotation_rate_flat
functions.description: Get an array of the zone rotational rate tensor. The return value is a 2D array where the component ordering is xx,yy,zz,xy,yz,xz.

functions.name: strain_shear_inc
functions.description: Return an array of the zone shear strain increment .

functions.name: strain_shear_rate
functions.description: Return an array of the zone shear strain rate.

functions.name: strain_vol_inc
functions.description: Return an array of the zone volumetric strain increment.

functions.name: strain_vol_rate
functions.description: Return an array of the zone volumetric strain rate.

functions.name: stress
functions.description: Get an array of the zone stresses.

functions.name: stress_flat
functions.description: Get an array of the zone stresses. The return value is a 2D array where the component ordering is xx,yy,zz,xy,yz,xz.

functions.name: thermal_prop
functions.description: Return an array of the thermal property prop_name for each zone. If a property is not specified in a zone, fill_value is given for that zone. fill_value is an optional argument and defaults to zero.

functions.name: volume
functions.description: Return an array of the zone volumes.
